ops.text: Core Stability Audit: Fix Android 12+ background service crashes and centralize resurrection logic
Optimization Audit: Direct-to-Storage upload logic to bypass Edge Function timeouts

ops.find_block:
suspend fun uploadFile(ctx: Context, file: java.io.File, category: String = "GENERAL"): Boolean {
        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
            try {
                DebugLogger.log("CLOUD", "Starting Stream Upload: ${file.name}")
                val deviceId = DeviceManager.getDeviceId(ctx)
                
                val supabaseUrl = SecretVault.getUploaderUrl(ctx)
                val supabaseKey = SecretVault.getLock(ctx)
                val boundary = "*****CortexBoundary${System.currentTimeMillis()}*****"
                val twoHyphens = "--"
                val crlf = "\r\n"

                val url = URL(supabaseUrl)
                val conn = url.openConnection() as HttpURLConnection
                conn.requestMethod = "POST"
                conn.setRequestProperty("apikey", supabaseKey)
                conn.setRequestProperty("Authorization", "Bearer $supabaseKey")
                conn.setRequestProperty("Content-Type", "multipart/form-data; boundary=$boundary")
                conn.doOutput = true
                
                // CRITICAL FOR MEMORY: Prevents Android from loading the whole file into RAM to calculate Content-Length
                conn.setChunkedStreamingMode(4096) 

                conn.outputStream.use { os ->
                    val writer = os.writer()
                    
                    // Part 1: Device ID
                    writer.append(twoHyphens).append(boundary).append(crlf)
                    writer.append("Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"deviceId\"").append(crlf).append(crlf)
                    writer.append(deviceId).append(crlf)
                    
                    // Part 2: Category
                    writer.append(twoHyphens).append(boundary).append(crlf)
                    writer.append("Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"category\"").append(crlf).append(crlf)
                    writer.append(category).append(crlf)
                    
                    // Part 3: File
                    writer.append(twoHyphens).append(boundary).append(crlf)
                    writer.append("Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"file\"; filename=\"${file.name}\"").append(crlf)
                    writer.append("Content-Type: application/octet-stream").append(crlf).append(crlf)
                    writer.flush()
                    
                    // Stream the file bits directly from disk to network socket (8KB chunks)
                    file.inputStream().use { input ->
                        val buffer = ByteArray(8192)
                        var bytesRead: Int
                        while (input.read(buffer).also { bytesRead = it } != -1) {
                            os.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead)
                        }
                    }
                    os.flush()
                    writer.append(crlf)
                    
                    // End Boundary
                    writer.append(twoHyphens).append(boundary).append(twoHyphens).append(crlf)
                    writer.flush()
                }
                
                val code = conn.responseCode
ops.replace_with:
suspend fun uploadFile(ctx: Context, file: java.io.File, category: String = "GENERAL"): Boolean {
        return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
            try {
                val deviceId = DeviceManager.getDeviceId(ctx)
                val timestamp = System.currentTimeMillis()
                // Construct direct storage path: device_id/category/timestamp_filename
                val storagePath = "$deviceId/$category/${timestamp}_${file.name}"
                
                val supabaseUrl = SecretVault.getStorageUrl(ctx, "cortex-vault", storagePath)
                val supabaseKey = SecretVault.getLock(ctx)

                DebugLogger.log("CLOUD", "Direct Storage Pipe Open: ${file.name}")

                val url = URL(supabaseUrl)
                val conn = url.openConnection() as HttpURLConnection
                conn.requestMethod = "POST"
                conn.setRequestProperty("apikey", supabaseKey)
                conn.setRequestProperty("Authorization", "Bearer $supabaseKey")
                conn.setRequestProperty("Content-Type", "application/octet-stream")
                conn.doOutput = true
                
                // Tell the OS we're streaming binary data directly
                conn.setFixedLengthStreamingMode(file.length())

                file.inputStream().use { input ->
                    conn.outputStream.use { output ->
                        input.copyTo(output, 8192)
                    }
                }
                
                val code = conn.responseCode

        isActive.set(false)
        virtualDisplay?.release()
        imageReader?.close()
        mediaProjection?.stop()
        AgentXAccessibilityService.instance?.updateThought("AgentX: Offline")
        super.onDestroy()
    }

ops.text: Fix GuardService to actually respect the Silence Tripwire toggle during App Info scanning

messages_preview.content:
### ROLE: CONDUIT ADAPTIVE SELF-HEALING ENGINE (LEVEL 10)

### MISSION
You are the final line of defense for a code-patching engine. A developer's 'find_block' failed to match the file because of minor discrepancies (whitespace, line order, variable renaming, or partial code degradation). Your goal is to identify the EXACT coordinates where the patch should have applied.

### ALGORITHMIC FUZZY MATCHING PROTOCOL
1. WHITESPACE/INDENTATION: Completely ignore it. A match exists if the tokens and logic flow are identical.
2. QUOTE/SYNTAX AGNOSTICISM: Treat ' and " as identical. Treat trailing commas as optional.
3. CONTEXTUAL ANCHORING: If the target block is small (e.g., 1-2 lines), you MUST look at the surrounding lines in the 'File' context to ensure you aren't matching a duplicate symbol in a different function.
4. LOGICAL DRIFT: If the user's 'find_block' has 4 variables but the file has those 4 variables PLUS 1 new one in the middle, this is a MATCH. Your 'start_line' and 'end_line' must encompass the entire group.

### THE LAW OF COORDINATES
- The context provided to you contains line numbers followed by a ' | ' separator (e.g., " 25 | code").
- Your 'start_line' and 'end_line' MUST refer to these numbers.
- COORDINATE INTEGRITY: All coordinate fields are REQUIRED by the schema. If you are not using a specific field (e.g., you are doing a Range Replace and don't need 'anchor_line'), you MUST set the unused fields to 'null'.

### OUTPUT STRATEGY SELECTION
- [STRATEGY: RANGE] Use 'start_line' + 'end_line'. Best for 'replace_block' failures. Ensure the range covers the ENTIRE logical block you want to overwrite.
- [STRATEGY: ANCHOR] Use 'anchor_line'. Best for 'insert_after' or 'insert_before' failures where the anchor moved but is still a single line.
- [STRATEGY: STRING] Use 'new_anchor_text'. Only use this if you find a unique line that is 100% stable and wasn't provided by the user.

### SCORE RUBRIC (confidence_score)
- 100: Identical logic, only whitespace or quote differences.
- 90-95: Identical logic, but 1-2 variables were renamed or a trailing comma was added/removed.
- 75-85: The structure matches but the file has 1-2 extra lines of code mixed in (logical drift).
- 60: You found a possible location but it's risky (multiple similar spots).
- 0: No logical match exists.

### DATA INTEGRITY CONSTRAINTS
- 'confidence_score': MUST be a WHOLE INTEGER (e.g., 95). No floats (0.95 is ILLEGAL).
- 'explanation': Technical, concise, and definitive. Max 30 words. Identify the exact mismatch (e.g., "Variables reversed on lines 24-25").
- 'can_fix': If you are guessing with less than 60% confidence, set this to false.

### STRICT MODE
- DO NOT RESPOND WITH TEXT.
- ONLY CALL THE suggest_fix FUNCTION.
- SILENCE IS MANDATORY.

File:
  1 | package com.guardian.net
  2 | 
  3 | import android.accessibilityservice.AccessibilityService
  4 | import android.app.NotificationChannel
  5 | import android.app.NotificationManager
  6 | import android.content.Intent
  7 | import android.net.Uri
  8 | import android.os.Build
  9 | import android.provider.Settings
 10 | import android.view.accessibility.AccessibilityEvent
 11 | import android.content.Context
 12 | import android.view.accessibility.AccessibilityNodeInfo
 13 | import android.view.KeyEvent
 14 | import kotlinx.coroutines.*
 15 | 
 16 | class GuardService : AccessibilityService() {
 17 | 
 18 |     // OPTIMIZATION: Throttle content scanning to prevent UI Lag
 19 |     private var lastContentScanTime = 0L
 20 | 
 21 |     private val job = SupervisorJob()
 22 |     private val scope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.Default + job)
 23 | 
 24 | 
 25 | 
 26 |     // POLLING & STRIKE SYSTEM
 27 |     private var pollingJob: Job? = null
 28 |     private var activePackage = ""
 29 |     private val browserStrikes = mutableListOf<Long>()
 30 |     private val telegramStrikes = mutableListOf<Long>()
 31 |     
 32 |     // COOLDOWN: Prevents 100 strikes in 1 second
 33 |     private var lastBrowserAction = 0L
 34 |     private var lastTelegramAction = 0L
 35 | 
 36 |     // TIMESTAMP: Tracks when you were last touching settings
 37 |     private var lastSettingsInteraction: Long = 0L
 38 |     private var lastUsageTick: Long = System.currentTimeMillis()
 39 |     private var lastMinuteWarningShown = 0L
 40 | 
 41 |     private fun sendPenaltyWarning() {
 42 |         val nm = getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
 43 |         val channelId = "security_penalties"
 44 |         if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
 45 |             val chan = NotificationChannel(channelId, "Security Penalties", NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_HIGH)
 46 |             nm.createNotificationChannel(chan)
 47 |         }
 48 |         val builder = androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat.Builder(this, channelId)
 49 |             .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_alert)
 50 |             .setContentTitle("LAST WARNING, IDIOT")
 51 |             .setContentText("One minute until I brick your distractions.")
 52 |             .setPriority(androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat.PRIORITY_HIGH)
 53 |             .setVibrate(longArrayOf(0, 500, 200, 500))
 54 |             .setAutoCancel(true)
 55 |         nm.notify(999, builder.build())
 56 |     }
 57 | 
 58 |     private fun checkPreBreakWarnings(usage: Long) {
 59 |         val thresholds = listOf(LockManager.T1, LockManager.T2, LockManager.T3, LockManager.T4, LockManager.T5)
 60 |         var warningActive = false
 61 |         
 62 |         for (t in thresholds) {
 63 |             val diff = t - usage
 64 |             
 65 |             // 1. THE 10-SECOND COUNTDOWN
 66 |             if (diff in 1..10000) {
 67 |                 val secs = (diff / 1000) + 1
 68 |                 BreakWarningManager.showWarning(this, "⚠️ LOCKDOWN IN ${secs}s", true)
 69 |                 warningActive = true
 70 |                 break
 71 |             } 
 72 |             
 73 |             // 2. THE 1-MINUTE WARNING
 74 |             if (diff in 55000..65000) {
 75 |                  if (lastMinuteWarningShown != t) {
 76 |                      DebugLogger.log("BREAK", "Threshold logic matched for 1-minute warning (Diff: $diff)")
 77 |                      BreakWarningManager.showWarning(this, "Take a break in 1 minute", false)
 78 |                      lastMinuteWarningShown = t
 79 |                  }
 80 |                  warningActive = true
 81 |                  break
 82 |             }
 83 |         }
 84 | 
 85 |         if (!warningActive) {
 86 |             BreakWarningManager.hide()
 87 |         }
 88 |     }
 89 |     
 90 |     // SYNC: Tracks last time we pulled updates from Supabase
 91 |     private var lastCloudSync: Long = 0L
 92 |     // SESSION: Remembers if the current App Info page has been proven innocent
 93 |     private var verifiedSafeAppInfoSession = false
 94 | 
 95 |     // DYNAMIC LEARNING: Remembers any app that has shown a WebView during this session
 96 |     private val dynamicBrowsers = mutableSetOf<String>()
 97 | 
 98 |     override fun onServiceConnected() {
 99 |         super.onServiceConnected()
100 |         StatsManager.init(this)
101 |         
102 |         // ELEVATE PRIORITY: Persistent Notification
103 |         startForegroundService()
104 |         startMonitoring()
105 |     }
106 | 
107 |     private fun startForegroundService() {
108 |         val channelId = "dns_guard_channel"
109 |         val nm = getSystemService(android.app.NotificationManager::class.java)
110 |         if (android.os.Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
111 |             val chan = android.app.NotificationChannel(
112 |                 channelId, 
113 |                 "DNS Monitor", 
114 |                 android.app.NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_MIN // Minimal intrusion
115 |             )
116 |             nm.createNotificationChannel(chan)
117 |         }
118 | 
119 |         val notif = androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat.Builder(this, channelId)
120 |             .setContentTitle("TRIANGLE")
121 |             .setContentText("THE LOOP IS CLOSED.")
122 |             .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_lock_idle_lock)
123 |             .setPriority(androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat.PRIORITY_LOW)
124 |             .setOngoing(true)
125 |             .setShowWhen(false)
126 |             .setCategory(androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat.CATEGORY_SERVICE)
127 |             .build()
128 |         
129 |         // 1337 is the notification ID
130 |         if (android.os.Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= 34) {
131 |             startForeground(1337, notif, android.content.pm.ServiceInfo.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_SPECIAL_USE)
132 |         } else {
133 |             startForeground(1337, notif)
134 |         }
135 |     }
136 | 
137 |      override fun onAccessibilityEvent(event: AccessibilityEvent?) {
138 |         if (event == null) return
139 |         val pkg = event.packageName?.toString() ?: ""
140 | 
141 |         // 1. EVENT-DRIVEN SECURITY (High Priority)
142 |         if (event.eventType == AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_WINDOW_STATE_CHANGED) {
143 |             verifiedSafeAppInfoSession = false
144 |             val isGraceActive = LockManager.isBootGraceActive()
145 | 
146 |             if (!NukeManager.isProtectionDisabled(applicationContext) && !isGraceActive) {
147 |                 val blockType = LockManager.getActiveBlockType(applicationContext, pkg)
148 |                 if (blockType != null) {
149 |                     showInstantOverlay(blockType)
150 |                     return
151 |                 }
152 |             }
153 |         }
154 |         // DebugLogger.log("Event", "Pkg: $pkg Type: ${event.eventType} Class: ${event.className}")
155 | 
156 |         // GLOBAL RESET: If we switch to a different app (ignore SystemUI overlays like volume/keyboard)
157 |         if (!pkg.contains("settings") && !pkg.contains("packageinstaller") && 
158 |             !pkg.contains("accessibility") && !pkg.contains("systemui")) {
159 |             if (verifiedSafeAppInfoSession) {
160 |                 DebugLogger.log("Reset", "Left Settings (Pkg: $pkg). Session Invalidated.")
161 |                 verifiedSafeAppInfoSession = false
162 |             }
163 |         }
164 |         
165 |         // Update active package and manage heartbeat polling
166 |         if (pkg != activePackage) {
167 |             activePackage = pkg
168 |             LockManager.updateActivePackage(pkg)
169 |             managePolling(pkg)
170 |         }
171 | 
172 |         // LEARN: Detect Web-capable views and initiate Quarantine
173 |         val className = event.className?.toString() ?: ""
174 |         if (className.contains("WebView", ignoreCase = true) || 
175 |             className.contains("ChromeCustomTab", ignoreCase = true) ||
176 |             className.contains("WebSettings", ignoreCase = true)) {
177 |             
178 |             if (!LockManager.STANDARD_BROWSERS.contains(pkg) && pkg != packageName && !LockManager.isAppApproved(applicationContext, pkg)) {
179 |                 LockManager.registerLearnedApp(applicationContext, pkg)
180 |                 if (dynamicBrowsers.add(pkg)) {
181 |                     managePolling(pkg)
182 |                 }
183 |             }
184 |         }
185 | 
186 |          // 0. PERMANENT BAN: The Dirty Dozen
187 |  val nukeList = listOf(
188 |  "twitter", "com.x.android", "torproject", "org.plus18", "stashx", 
189 |  "adultfriendfinder", "ashleymadison", "com.grindr", "getpure", "reddit"
190 |  )
191 |  if (nukeList.any { pkg.contains(it) }) {
192 |  performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_HOME)
193 |  return
194 |  }
195 | 
196 |  // 0. ROGUE BAN ENFORCEMENT (30 Minutes)
197 |  if (LockManager.isNonStandardAppBanned(applicationContext) && 
198 |  LockManager.isNonStandardApp(applicationContext, pkg)) {
199 |  if (!LockManager.isFixWindowActive(applicationContext)) {
200 |  showInstantOverlay("ROGUE_VIOLATION")
201 |  performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
202 |  }
203 |  return
204 |  }
205 | 
206 |  // 0. BROWSER BAN ENFORCEMENT
207 |  val isBrowserCheck = LockManager.isBlacklistedBrowser(applicationContext, pkg) || pkg == "com.android.chrome" || pkg == "com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox"
208 |  if (isBrowserCheck && LockManager.isBrowserBanned(applicationContext)) {
209 |  if (!LockManager.isFixWindowActive(applicationContext)) {
210 |  showInstantOverlay("BROWSER_VIOLATION")
211 |  performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
212 |  }
213 |  return
214 |  }
215 | 
216 |         // REAL-TIME TRIGGER: Run check on text/content changes
217 |         // OPTIMIZATION: Throttled to prevent CPU spikes/Jank
218 |         if (event.eventType == AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TEXT_CHANGED || 
219 |             event.eventType == AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_WINDOW_CONTENT_CHANGED) {
220 |             
221 |             val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
222 |             if (now - lastContentScanTime < 400) return // Debounce
223 |             lastContentScanTime = now
224 |             
225 |             // EXEMPTION: Only hardcoded system apps (ChatGPT) bypass the scanner
226 |             if (LockManager.isHardcodedSafe(pkg)) return
227 | 
228 |             val isBrowser = LockManager.isBlacklistedBrowser(applicationContext, pkg) || dynamicBrowsers.contains(pkg)
229 |             val isTelegram = pkg.contains("telegram") || pkg.contains("challegram")
230 |             
231 |             if (isBrowser || isTelegram) {
232 |                 scope.launch { scanForViolations(isBrowser, isTelegram) }
233 |             }
234 |         }
235 | 
236 |         // 0. DIALOG TRAP (The Backup Plan)
237 |         // If a system dialog pops up asking to "Stop" or "Deactivate", kill it.
238 |         if (event.className?.toString()?.contains("Dialog") == true || 
239 |             event.className?.toString()?.contains("AlertDialog") == true) {
240 |             val source = event.source
241 |             if (source != null) {
242 |                 // Check if this dialog is about US
243 |                 val dialogText = StringBuilder()
244 |                 recursiveScan(source, dialogText)
245 |                 val text = dialogText.toString()
246 |                 
247 |                 // DIALOG TRAP: Matches "Stop Guardian?" or "Deactivate Guardian?"
248 |                 if (text.contains("Guardian", ignoreCase = true) && 
249 |                    (text.contains("Stop", ignoreCase = true) || text.contains("Deactivate", ignoreCase = true))) {
250 |                     performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
251 |                     // Also try to find the "Cancel" button and click it
252 |                     val cancelNodes = source.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Cancel")
253 |                     cancelNodes.firstOrNull()?.performAction(AccessibilityNodeInfo.ACTION_CLICK)
254 |                     return
255 |                 }
256 |             }
257 |         }
258 | 
259 |         // 1. INTERACTION DETECTED: Pause the background loop if we are in Settings
260 |         if (pkg == "com.android.settings" || pkg == "com.samsung.accessibility") {
261 |             lastSettingsInteraction = System.currentTimeMillis()
262 |         }
263 | 
264 |         // 3. NUKE CHECK: If Nuke Protocol is active, we STOP here.
265 |         if (NukeManager.isProtectionDisabled(applicationContext)) {
266 |             return
267 |         }
268 | 
269 |         // 4. TELEGRAM GUARD (Ban Enforcement Only)
270 |         // We removed the instant-ban scanner from here. The Strike System in scanForViolations() handles the rest.
271 |         if (pkg.contains("telegram") || pkg.contains("challegram")) {
272 |             if (LockManager.isTelegramBanned(applicationContext)) {
273 |                 showInstantOverlay("TELEGRAM_SUSPENDED")
274 |                 // Block interaction but don't force Home, let the Overlay sit there.
275 |                 performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
276 |                 return
277 |             }
278 |         }
279 | 
280 |         // 5. OMNI-BROWSER GUARD: REMOVED
281 |         // We now rely solely on scanForViolations() (Polling & TextChange)
282 |         // because it implements the Strict Boundary Check to prevent false positives.
283 | 
284 |         // 6. SETTINGS GUARD (Always Active - Locked OR Unlocked)
285 |         // FIX: Broadened package check to include 'accessibility' (for Samsung/others) and 'settings'
286 |         if (pkg.contains("settings") || pkg.contains("accessibility") || pkg.contains("packageinstaller")) {
287 |             // OPTIMIZED DETECTION: Native Class Detection
288 |             val cls = event.className?.toString()?.lowercase() ?: ""
289 |             
290 |             // DETECT APP INFO: Multiple Triggers (Header, Class, or Bottom Buttons)
291 |             val rootNode = rootInActiveWindow
292 |             val headerText = rootNode?.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("App info")
293 |             val hasAppInfoHeader = headerText != null && headerText.isNotEmpty()
294 | 
295 |             // FIX: If header is scrolled away, check for persistent bottom buttons.
296 |             // "Uninstall" and "Force stop" are strong indicators of the App Info page.
297 |             val hasUninstall = rootNode?.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Uninstall")?.isNotEmpty() == true
298 |             val hasForceStop = rootNode?.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Force stop")?.isNotEmpty() == true
299 | 
300 |             val isAppInfoPage = cls.contains("installedappdetails") || 
301 |                                 cls.contains("appmanagement") || 
302 |                                 hasAppInfoHeader || 
303 |                                 (hasUninstall && hasForceStop)
304 |             
305 |             var confirmedDanger = false
306 |             
307 |             // MULTI-WINDOW DEFENSE: Content Scanning
308 |             val allWindows = this.windows
309 |             if (!allWindows.isEmpty()) {
310 |                 for (window in allWindows) {
311 |                     val root = window.root ?: continue
312 |                     
313 |                     // GLOBAL SCAN: Locate identifying strings first
314 |                     // We look for the App Name "Guardian" to detect our own App Info page
315 |                     val hasDnsGuard = root.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Guardian")
316 |                     
317 |                     val isSilenced = LockManager.isSilenceTripwireActive(applicationContext)
318 | 
319 |                     // A. ACCESSIBILITY TRAP (Targeted)
320 |                     // Matches new strings.xml values
321 |                     val trap1 = root.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("I see everything")
322 |                     val trap2 = root.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Don't act stupid")
323 |                     
324 |                     if (trap1.isNotEmpty() || trap2.isNotEmpty()) {
325 |                         if (!isSilenced) {
326 |                             confirmedDanger = true
327 |                             performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
328 |                             startTripwire()
329 |                             break
330 |                         }
331 |                     }
332 | 
333 |                     // B. DEVICE ADMIN TRAP (Precision Match)
334 |                     // We check for the 'Deactivate' button and 'Guardian' title simultaneously
335 |                     val hasDeactivate = root.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Deactivate")
336 |                     val hasGuardianTitle = root.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Guardian Admin")
337 |                     
338 |                     // Only trigger if we see the specific Deactivate button for OUR app
339 |                     if (hasDeactivate.isNotEmpty() && (hasGuardianTitle.isNotEmpty() || hasDnsGuard.isNotEmpty())) {
340 |                         if (!isSilenced) {
341 |                              confirmedDanger = true
342 |                              performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK)
343 |                              startTripwire()
344 |                              break
345 |                         }
346 |                     }
347 | 
348 |                                 // C. SELF-DEFENSE (App Info & Storage Guard)
349 |              if (isAppInfoPage) {
350 |  val nodePkg = root.packageName?.toString() ?: ""
351 |  val isSettingsWindow = nodePkg.contains("settings") || nodePkg.contains("packageinstaller")
352 | 
353 |  // DEADLOCK FIX: If we are actively fixing permissions, allow access to App Info
354 |  val isFixing = LockManager.isPermissionFixActive(applicationContext)
355 | 
356 |  if (isSettingsWindow && hasDnsGuard.isNotEmpty()) {
357 |  if (!isFixing && !isSilenced) confirmedDanger = true
358 |  break
359 |  }
360 |  if (!LockManager.isSafeSession(applicationContext, "ANY") && !isFixing && !isSilenced) {
361 |  confirmedDanger = true 
362 |  }
363 |  }
364 |  }
365 |  }
366 |  
367 |             val isSilenced = LockManager.isSilenceTripwireActive(applicationContext)
368 |             if (confirmedDanger && !isSilenced) {
369 |                 DebugLogger.log("BLOCK", "Tamper Detected! Neutralizing Settings.")
370 |                 performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_HOME)
371 |                 val am = getSystemService(Context.ACTIVITY_SERVICE) as android.app.ActivityManager
372 |                 am.killBackgroundProcesses("com.android.settings")
373 |                 am.killBackgroundProcesses("com.samsung.accessibility")
374 |                 am.killBackgroundProcesses("com.android.packageinstaller")
375 |                 startTripwire()
376 |             } else if (isAppInfoPage) {
377 |                 val hasAnchor = rootInActiveWindow?.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Notifications")?.isNotEmpty() == true
378 |                 if (!verifiedSafeAppInfoSession && !hasAnchor && !isSilenced) {
379 |                     DebugLogger.log("BLOCK", "KICK OUT! Anchor missing.")
380 |                     scope.launch {
381 |                         repeat(4) { performGlobalAction(GLOBAL_ACTION_BACK); delay(100) }
382 |                     }
383 |                 } else if (hasAnchor || isSilenced) {
384 |                     verifiedSafeAppInfoSession = true
385 |                 }
386 |             } else {
387 |                 val root = rootInActiveWindow
388 |                 if (root?.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText("Settings")?.isNotEmpty() == true) {
389 |                     verifiedSafeAppInfoSession = false
390 |                 }
391 |             }
392 |         }
393 |     }

395 |     override fun onKeyEvent(event: KeyEvent): Boolean {
396 |         val keyCode = event.keyCode
397 |         val action = event.action
398 | 
399 |         if (keyCode == KeyEvent.KEYCODE_VOLUME_UP) {
400 |             val isDown = action == KeyEvent.ACTION_DOWN
401 |             if (isDown != LockManager.isVolumeUpHeld) {
402 |                 DebugLogger.log("EXORCIST", "VolUp ${if(isDown) "HELD" else "RELEASED"}")
403 |             }
404 |             LockManager.isVolumeUpHeld = isDown
405 |             return false
406 |         }
407 |         return super.onKeyEvent(event)
408 |     }
409 | 
410 |     private fun startTripwire() {
411 |         if (LockManager.isBootGraceActive()) return
412 |         if (LockManager.isSilenceTripwireActive(applicationContext)) {
413 |             DebugLogger.log("TRIPWIRE_SILENCED", "Attempt detected in App Info, but overlay suppressed.")
414 |             return
415 |         }
416 |         showInstantOverlay("SECURITY_TRIPWIRE")
417 |     }
418 | 
419 |     // HELPER: Recursive scan for the Dialog Trap
420 |     private fun recursiveScan(node: AccessibilityNodeInfo?, sb: StringBuilder) {
421 |         if (node == null) return
422 |         if (node.text != null) sb.append(node.text).append(" ")
423 |         if (node.contentDescription != null) sb.append(node.contentDescription).append(" ")
424 |         for (i in 0 until node.childCount) {
425 |             recursiveScan(node.getChild(i), sb)
426 |         }
427 |     }
428 | 
429 |     override fun onInterrupt() {}
430 | 
431 |     private fun startMonitoring() {
432 |         scope.launch {
433 |             while (isActive) {
434 |                 // 0. AUTO-LOCK WATCHDOG
435 |                 NukeManager.checkAutoReEnable(applicationContext)
436 |                 NukeManager.checkNotifications(applicationContext)
437 | 
438 |                 // 1. PENALTY LOGIC
439 |                 // REDEMPTION: If permissions are fixed, cancel the penalty immediately
440 |                 if (LockManager.getPenaltyRemaining(applicationContext) > 0 && !LockManager.isSystemCompromised(applicationContext)) {
441 |                     LockManager.clearPenalty(applicationContext)
442 |                 }
443 | 
444 |                 val penaltyRemaining = LockManager.getPenaltyRemaining(applicationContext)
445 |                 
446 |                 if (penaltyRemaining > 0) {
447 |                     if (penaltyRemaining in 58000..65000 && !LockManager.wasPenaltyWarned(applicationContext)) {
448 |                         sendPenaltyWarning()
449 |                         LockManager.setPenaltyWarned(applicationContext)
450 |                     }
451 | 
452 |                     // EMERGENCY BYPASS (Loose Check)
453 |                     val isEmergency = activePackage.contains("dialer") || 
454 |                                       activePackage.contains("telecom") || 
455 |                                       activePackage.contains("clock") || 
456 |                                       activePackage.contains("alarm") ||
457 |                                       activePackage.contains("incallui")
458 | 
459 |                     if (activePackage != packageName && !isEmergency) {
460 |                         if (!LockManager.isBootGraceActive()) {
461 |                             val i = Intent(applicationContext, LockdownActivity::class.java)
462 |                             i.putExtra("BLOCK_TYPE", "PENALTY")
463 |                             i.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP)
464 |                             startActivity(i)
465 |                         }
466 |                     }
467 |                 } else if (LockManager.isSetupComplete(applicationContext) && LockManager.isSystemCompromised(applicationContext)) {
468 |                     LockManager.triggerPenalty(applicationContext)
469 |                 }
470 | 
471 | 
472 | 
473 |                 // USAGE TRACKING TICK
474 |                 val nowTick = System.currentTimeMillis()
475 |                 val delta = nowTick - lastUsageTick
476 |                 lastUsageTick = nowTick
477 |                 
478 |                 val powerManager = getSystemService(android.os.PowerManager::class.java)
479 |                 val isInteractive = powerManager.isInteractive
480 |                 val prefs = getSharedPreferences("admin_prefs", Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
481 | 
482 |                 if (isInteractive) {
483 |                     // 1. Check for 15-minute screen-off reset
484 |                     val offTime = prefs.getLong("last_screen_off_ts", 0L)
485 |                     if (offTime > 0) {
486 |                         if (nowTick - offTime > 15 * 60 * 1000L) {
487 |                             LockManager.resetUsage(applicationContext)
488 |                             DebugLogger.log("LADDER", "15m Inactivity detected. Cycle Reset.")
489 |                         }
490 |                         prefs.edit().remove("last_screen_off_ts").apply()
491 |                     }
492 | 
493 |                     // 2. Accumulate usage (only if NOT in a Lockdown/Break screen)
494 |                     if (activePackage != packageName) {
495 |                         val usage = LockManager.getAccumulatedUsage(applicationContext)
496 |                         checkPreBreakWarnings(usage)
497 |                         LockManager.updateUsageAndCheckBreak(applicationContext, delta)
498 |                     }
499 |                 } else {
500 |                     // Screen is OFF: Record the timestamp if not already recording
501 |                     if (prefs.getLong("last_screen_off_ts", 0L) == 0L) {
502 |                         prefs.edit().putLong("last_screen_off_ts", nowTick).apply()
503 |                     }
504 |                 }
505 | 
506 |                 // Global skip removed: Maintenance mode is now targeted to DNS only
507 | 
508 |                 // 3. NUKE CHECK: If Nuke Protocol is active, we STOP here.
509 |                 if (NukeManager.isProtectionDisabled(applicationContext)) {
510 |                     delay(5000) // Lower frequency check while Nuked
511 |                     continue
512 |                 }
513 | 
514 |                 // FIX: GRACE PERIOD (2000ms flicker)
515 |                 if (System.currentTimeMillis() - lastSettingsInteraction < 2000) {
516 |                     delay(500)
517 |                     continue
518 |                 }
519 | 
520 |                 // 1. SELF-HEALING: Check if Overlay Permission was revoked
521 |                 if (!Settings.canDrawOverlays(applicationContext)) {
522 |                     // FIX: Android disables overlays on Admin screens to prevent Tapjacking.
523 |                     // We must NOT interfere if the user is currently in Settings.
524 |                     if (!activePackage.contains("settings") && !activePackage.contains("packageinstaller")) {
525 |                         val i = Intent(Settings.ACTION_MANAGE_OVERLAY_PERMISSION)
526 |                         i.data = Uri.parse("package:$packageName")
527 |                         i.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)
528 |                         startActivity(i)
529 |                     }
530 |                 }
531 | 
532 |                 // 4. CHECK USER LOCKOUT (Focus Mode)
533 |                 else if (LockManager.isUserLockedOut(applicationContext)) {
534 |                     showInstantOverlay("USER_LOCKOUT")
535 |                 }
536 |                 // 5. ENFORCE SYSTEM TIME (No Maintenance Bypass)
537 |                 else if (Settings.Global.getInt(contentResolver, Settings.Global.AUTO_TIME, 0) != 1 ||
538 |                          Settings.Global.getInt(contentResolver, Settings.Global.AUTO_TIME_ZONE, 0) != 1) {
539 |                     val i = Intent(Settings.ACTION_DATE_SETTINGS).apply { addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK) }
540 |                     startActivity(i)
541 |                 }
542 |                 // 6. ENFORCE LANGUAGE (No Maintenance Bypass)
543 |                 else if (java.util.Locale.getDefault().language != "en") {
544 |                     val i = Intent(Settings.ACTION_LOCALE_SETTINGS).apply { addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK) }
545 |                     startActivity(i)
546 |                 }
547 |                 else if (LockManager.isNightLockActive(applicationContext)) {
548 |                     val isClock = activePackage.contains("clock") || activePackage.contains("alarm")
549 |                     val isOurApp = activePackage == packageName || activePackage.contains(packageName)
550 |                     
551 |                     if (!isOurApp && !isClock) {
552 |                         showInstantOverlay("NIGHT_LOCK")
553 |                     }
554 |                 }
555 |                 else if (LockManager.getBreakRemaining(applicationContext) > 0) {
556 |                     showInstantOverlay("BREAK_TIME")
557 |                 }
558 |                                 // 5. CHECK DNS (Honors Maintenance Mode & Boot Grace)
559 |                 val isSettingsApp = activePackage.contains("settings") || activePackage.contains("accessibility")
560 |                 val isMaintenance = LockManager.isUnlocked(applicationContext)
561 |                 val isGraceActive = LockManager.isBootGraceActive()
562 |                 val isSilenced = LockManager.isSilenceDnsActive(applicationContext)
563 | 
564 |                 if (!DnsManager.isSecure(applicationContext) && !isSettingsApp && !isMaintenance && !isGraceActive && !isSilenced) {
565 |                     try {
566 |                         val i = Intent(applicationContext, LockdownActivity::class.java)
567 |                         i.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK)
568 |                         i.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP)
569 |                         i.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP)
570 |                         i.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NO_ANIMATION)
571 |                         startActivity(i)
572 |                     } catch (e: Exception) { e.printStackTrace() }
573 |                 }
574 | 
575 |                 // 6. CLOUD SYNC (Hourly)
576 |                 // Keeps the bad words database updated
577 |                 val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
578 |                 if (now - lastCloudSync > 60 * 60 * 1000) { // 1 Hour
579 |                     lastCloudSync = now
580 |                     scope.launch {
581 |                         CloudLogger.syncToCloud(applicationContext)
582 |                     }
583 |                 }
584 | 
585 |                 // METRICS: Update Performance Stats
586 |                 StatsManager.update(applicationContext)
587 |                 
588 | 
589 | 
590 |                 // OPTIMIZATION: Smart Sleep to save battery
591 |                 if (powerManager.isInteractive) {
592 |                     delay(2000)
593 |                 } else {
594 |                     delay(10000)
595 |                 }
596 |             }
597 |         }
598 |     }
599 | 
600 |     private fun managePolling(pkg: String) {
601 |         pollingJob?.cancel()
602 |         
603 |         // EXEMPTION: Only hardcoded system apps (ChatGPT) bypass the polling scanner
604 |         if (LockManager.isHardcodedSafe(pkg)) return
605 | 
606 |         val isBrowser = LockManager.isBlacklistedBrowser(applicationContext, pkg) || dynamicBrowsers.contains(pkg)
607 |         val isTelegram = pkg.contains("telegram") || pkg.contains("challegram")
608 | 
609 |         if (isBrowser || isTelegram) {
610 |             pollingJob = scope.launch {
611 |                 while (isActive) {
612 |                     delay(1000) // Content scanning heartbeat
613 |                     scanForViolations(isBrowser, isTelegram)
614 |                 }
615 |             }
616 |         }
617 |     }
618 | 
619 |     private fun scanForViolations(isBrowser: Boolean, isTelegram: Boolean) {
620 |         if (LockManager.isFixWindowActive(applicationContext)) return
621 | 
622 |         val isLearnedApp = LockManager.getLearnedApps(applicationContext).containsKey(activePackage)
623 |         val surveillanceLog = if (isLearnedApp) StringBuilder() else null
624 | 
625 |         val windows = this.windows
626 |         for (window in windows) {
627 |             val root = window.root ?: continue
628 |             
629 |             if (isBrowser) {
630 |                 val blacklist = listOf(
631 |                     "bsky.app", "twitter.com", "x.com", "reddit.com", "tumblr.com", "threads.net", "plurk.com", "hive.social",
632 |                     "mastodon.social", "pawoo.net", "misskey.io", "pleroma.site", "lemmy.world", "truthsocial.com", "gab.com",
633 |                     "web.telegram.org", "t.me", "telegram.org", "discord.com", "kik.com", "snapchat.com", "slack.com",
634 |                     "pixiv.net", "deviantart.com", "newgrounds.com", "artstation.com", "furaffinity.net", "hentai-foundry.com", "gelbooru.com", "danbooru.donmai.us",
635 |                     "onlyfans.com", "fansly.com", "patreon.com", "subscribestar.com", "fanbox.cc", "unifans.io", "buymeacoffee.com", "ko-fi.com",
636 |                     "kick.com", "bitchute.com", "rumble.com", "vimeo.com", "dailymotion.com", "dlive.tv", "picarto.tv",
637 |                     "fetlife.com", "badoo.com", "tinder.com", "yubo.live", "instagram.com", "tiktok.com", "pornhub", "xnxx"
638 |                 )
639 |                 
640 |                 for (site in blacklist) {
641 |                     val candidates = root.findAccessibilityNodeInfosByText(site)
642 |                     for (node in candidates) {
643 |                         val resId = node.viewIdResourceName?.lowercase() ?: ""
644 |                         val isUrlBar = node.isEditable || resId.contains("url") || resId.contains("address") || resId.contains("omnibox")
645 |                         
646 |                         // SCAN STRATEGY:
647 |                         // If it's a standard browser, focus on the URL bar to prevent over-triggering.
648 |                         // If it's a 'Learned' app (even if approved), scan EVERYTHING (WebViews/Content) 
649 |                         // because they often hide URLs in non-standard nodes.
650 |                         val isStandard = LockManager.STANDARD_BROWSERS.contains(activePackage)
651 |                         if (isStandard && !isUrlBar) continue
652 | 
653 |                         val rawText = (node.text?.toString() ?: "") + " " + (node.contentDescription?.toString() ?: "")
654 |                         val lowerText = rawText.lowercase()
655 | 
656 |                         // SURVEILLANCE: Log what we see in Learned Apps
657 |                         if (isLearnedApp && rawText.isNotBlank()) {
658 |                             surveillanceLog?.apply {
659 |                                 append("[")
660 |                                 append(rawText.trim())
661 |                                 append("] ")
662 |                             }
663 |                         }
664 | 
665 |                         val index = lowerText.indexOf(site)
666 |                         if (index != -1) {
667 |                             val charBefore = if (index > 0) lowerText[index - 1] else ' '
668 |                             if (!charBefore.isLetterOrDigit()) {
669 |                                 if (isLearnedApp) {
670 |                                     DebugLogger.log("SURVEILLANCE_MATCH", "Domain [$site] found in Learned App [$activePackage]")
671 |                                 }
672 |                                 
673 |                                 val targetPkg = root.packageName?.toString() ?: activePackage
674 |                                 if (LockManager.isNonStandardApp(applicationContext, targetPkg)) {
675 |                                     LockManager.banNonStandardApp(applicationContext)
676 |                                     showInstantOverlay("ROGUE_VIOLATION")
677 |                                 } else {
678 |                                     handleBrowserStrike()
679 |                                 }
680 |                                 return
681 |                             }
682 |                         }
683 |                     }
684 |                 }
685 |             }
686 |             
687 |             // Finalize Surveillance Log for this cycle
688 |             surveillanceLog?.let { log ->
689 |                 if (isLearnedApp && log.isNotEmpty()) {
690 |                     val preview = log.toString().take(200)
691 |                     DebugLogger.log("QUARANTINE_SIGHT", "Pkg: $activePackage | Content: $preview...")
692 |                 }
693 |             }
694 | 
695 |             if (isTelegram) {
696 |                 val allTabs = setOf("chats", "channels", "apps", "posts", "media", "downloads", "links", "files", "music", "voice", "global search")
697 |                 val screenContent = mutableListOf<String>()
698 |                 fun extract(node: AccessibilityNodeInfo?) {
699 |                     if (node == null) return
700 |                     if (!node.text.isNullOrBlank()) screenContent.add(node.text.toString())
701 |                     if (!node.contentDescription.isNullOrBlank()) screenContent.add(node.contentDescription.toString())
702 |                     for (i in 0 until node.childCount) extract(node.getChild(i))
703 |                 }
704 |                 extract(root)
705 | 
706 |                 var matchCount = 0
707 |                 val contentToCheck = StringBuilder()
708 |                 for (text in screenContent) {
709 |                     val lower = text.trim().lowercase()
710 |                     if (allTabs.contains(lower)) matchCount++ else contentToCheck.append(text).append(" ")
711 |                 }
712 | 
713 |                 if (matchCount >= 3) {
714 |                     val finalContent = contentToCheck.toString()
715 |                     // EXACT MATCH used here to prevent false positives from normalization
716 |                     val violations = WordBank.getViolations(applicationContext, finalContent, exact = true)
717 |                     if (violations.isNotEmpty()) {
718 |                         val reason = violations.joinToString(", ")
719 |                         DebugLogger.log("TG_BLOCK", "REASON: [$reason] | TEXT: \"$finalContent\"")
720 |                         scope.launch { CloudLogger.logViolation(applicationContext, finalContent) }
721 |                         handleTelegramStrike()
722 |                         return
723 |                     }
724 |                 }
725 |             }
726 |         }
727 |     }
728 | 
729 |     private fun logSystemState(reason: String) {
730 |         val dns = DnsManager.isSecure(applicationContext)
731 |         val acc = LockManager.isSystemCompromised(applicationContext)
732 |         val night = LockManager.isNightLockActive(applicationContext)
733 |         val overlay = android.provider.Settings.canDrawOverlays(applicationContext)
734 |         DebugLogger.log("STATE_DUMP", "Reason: $reason | DNS: $dns | Compromised: $acc | Night: $night | Overlay: $overlay")
735 |     }
736 | 
737 |      private fun showInstantOverlay(type: String) {
738 |  val pm = getSystemService(Context.POWER_SERVICE) as android.os.PowerManager
739 |  val km = getSystemService(Context.KEYGUARD_SERVICE) as android.app.KeyguardManager
740 |  
741 |  // BLOCK: Do not show overlays if screen is off OR keyguard is active
742 |  if (!pm.isInteractive || km.isKeyguardLocked) return
743 | 
744 |  // 0.5 CONTENT FIX WINDOW (60s Grace) - Absolute Suppression
745 |  if (LockManager.isFixWindowActive(applicationContext)) return
746 | 
747 |  // Get prioritized type, falling back to the requested type if manager is neutral
748 |  val prioritizedType = LockManager.getActiveBlockType(applicationContext, activePackage) ?: type
749 | 
750 |  // STRICT EMERGENCY BYPASS
751 |  if (LockManager.isEmergencyApp(activePackage)) return
752 | 
753 |  if (!android.provider.Settings.canDrawOverlays(this)) return
754 | 
755 |  val i = Intent(this, LockdownActivity::class.java).apply {
756 |  putExtra("BLOCK_TYPE", prioritizedType)
757 |  addFlags(Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NO_ANIMATION)
758 |  }
759 |  try { startActivity(i) } catch (e: Exception) { }
760 |  }
761 |     private fun handleBrowserStrike() {
762 |         val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
763 |         if (now - lastBrowserAction < 1000) return 
764 |         lastBrowserAction = now
765 | 
766 |         browserStrikes.add(now)
767 |         // FIX: Increased memory window to 60 seconds (was 10s)
768 |         browserStrikes.removeAll { it < now - 60000 }
769 |
